title: eleocharis acutangula
intro: Eleocharis acutangula, also known as sharp-fruited spikerush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, it has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Eleocharis acutangula include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and treat various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, it is often used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, as well as in combination with other herbs to create tonics and syrups.
